meaning: n.君主,统治adj.至高无上的,君主的,独立自主的,完全的
examples: In March 1889, she became the first British sovereign to set foot on Spanish soil.
Singapore seceded from the Federation of Malaysia and became an independent sovereign state.
Lithuania and Armenia signed a treaty in Vilnius recognizing each other as independent sovereign states.
What made these laps noteworthy was the driver, Albert II, Sovereign Prince of Monaco.
"Iraq is a sovereign nation which is conducting its own foreign policy, " he said.
